data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior for the persona.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where 'Staff works at multiple locations', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual behavior of staff working across multiple locations. While the use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at different locations, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm this functionality is implemented or validated. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert the requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming that providers can work at multiple locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
